prompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
userPrompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
expandedPrompt: A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with a round, oversized head featuring sleepy, half-closed eyes. The body is compact and connected, resembling a mushroom's stalk, with a smooth texture and a glossy finish. The wizard holds a tiny glowing staff that emits a soft blue light. The character has small, whimsical mushroom caps as ears, and a starry pattern on its body. It wears a tiny wizard hat adorned with sparkles and has a subtle glow around its edges. The palette includes various shades of blue, with lighter accents for the glowing elements.

expandedContent:
{
  "title": "Sleepy Blue Mushroom Wizard",
  "expandedPrompt": "A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with a round, oversized head featuring sleepy, half-closed eyes. The body is compact and connected, resembling a mushroom's stalk, with a smooth texture and a glossy finish. The wizard holds a tiny glowing staff that emits a soft blue light. The character has small, whimsical mushroom caps as ears, and a starry pattern on its body. It wears a tiny wizard hat adorned with sparkles and has a subtle glow around its edges. The palette includes various shades of blue, with lighter accents for the glowing elements.",
  "subject": "a blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes",
  "mood": "whimsical and sleepy",
  "palettePlan": { "primary": "deep blue", "secondary": "light blue", "accent": "glowing white" },
  "styleTags": ["cute mascot", "glossy SVG", "blue-avatar quality"],
  "visualChecklist": [
    "oversized round head",
    "sleepy half-closed eyes",
    "tiny glowing staff",
    "mushroom cap ears",
    "starry pattern on body",
    "tiny wizard hat",
    "sparkles around the hat",
    "glow around the staff"
  ],
  "requiredDetails": [
    "oversized head with sleepy eyes",
    "deep blue body color",
    "tiny glowing staff with light emission",
    "mushroom cap ears"
  ],
  "requiredRenderableDetails": [
    { "id": "head", "label": "oversized round head", "acceptableShapes": ["circle"], "acceptableSockets": ["head.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "staff", "label": "tiny glowing staff", "acceptableShapes": ["stick"], "acceptableSockets": ["hand.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "ears", "label": "mushroom cap ears", "acceptableShapes": ["cap"], "acceptableSockets": ["ear.socket"], "minimumCount": 2 },
    { "id": "glow", "label": "glowing effect around staff", "acceptableShapes": ["glow"], "acceptableSockets": ["staff.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 }
  ],
  "forbiddenDetails": ["raw SVG", "HTML", "unvalidated custom shapes", "external images"],
  "qualityConstraints": ["oversized expressive head", "compact connected body", "readable silhouette", "valid renderer sockets only"]
}

  "componentName": "SleepyBlueMushroomWizard",
  "styleSystem": "my-dude-react-css-scaffold",
  "title": "Sleepy Blue Mushroom Wizard",
  "summary": "A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff.",
  "cssVariables": {
    "--dude-primary": "#38bdf8",
    "--dude-secondary": "#60a5fa",
    "--dude-accent": "#93c5fd",
    "--dude-eye": "#e0f2fe",

    "--dude-mouth": "#0f172a",
    "--dude-body": "#1e293b",
    "--dude-arm": "#60a5fa",
    "--dude-hand": "#facc15",
    "--dude-leg": "#1e293b",
    "--dude-foot": "#facc15"
  },
  "headShape": "mushroom",
  "bodyShape": "compact",
  "expression": "sleepy",
  "parts": [
    { "type": "ear", "side": "left", "label": "mushroom cap ear", "tone": "primary" },
    { "type": "ear", "side": "right", "label": "mushroom cap ear", "tone": "primary" },
    { "type": "hat", "label": "wizard hat", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "magic-staff", "side": "right", "label": "tiny glowing staff", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "spot", "label": "cap marking", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "spot", "label": "cap marking", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "mushroomCap", "tone": "primary" },
    { "type": "mushroomGills", "tone": "secondary" }
  ],
  "notes": ["Includes mushroom cap ears, a tiny glowing staff, and a starry pattern on the body."]
}

reactCssRepairNotes: held wand/staff must have side left/right so it can attach to a hand. Return corrected JSON only. Preserve the prompt, remove unrequested animal traits, and use renderer parts that satisfy the failure.
